name: Chocolate Cannoli Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake cake batter in 2 greased 9x5 inch loaf pans for 30-35 minutes at 350°F.
2. Cool and turn out as directed. Wrap, label, and freeze 1 loaf for another time.
3. Process ricotta cheese in a blender or food processor, scraping down sides often with a rubber spatula until smooth (A blender will do the smoothest job). Scrape into a medium-sized bowl.
4. Add whipped topping mix, confectioner's sugar, and liqueur. Beat with an electric mixer on high speed until smooth and well blended.
5. Stir in fruit and chocolate chips. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours, or up to 48 hours, to let the flavor develop.
6. Cut loaf cake in half horizontally. Place bottom half on serving plate.
7. Spread cut surface with half the cheese mixture. Place top half of cake on filling.
8. Press down lightly. Spread top with remaining cheese mixture.
9. Drizzle cake with chocolate sauce.
10. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Makes 12 servings.
